steps.title: Focus on legacy through media
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize how media built Wong Fei-hung's legacy. The relevant notes show a contrast: he had local recognition during his life, but depictions in films, television, and other media made him an internationally known folk hero.

steps.title: Keep the cause-and-effect link
steps.content: A incorrectly links media depictions to his local recognition. C mentions media and fame but weakens the causal transformation. D focuses only on how his abilities appear in media, not on how media built his legacy. The best sentence directly connects later media depictions to his international fame. The answer is B.
